title: Viners Everyday Purity 16 Piece Cutlery Set with Gift Box, 18/0 Stainless Steel
features: CLASSIC CUTLERY | This flatware cutlery set is enviably stylish. Each piece is expertly balanced with simple and smooth flared handles and an elegant design making it a delight to hold.

16 PIECE SET | Add that classic touch to everyday dining with the Everyday Purity collection. This set includes four dinner knives, four dinner forks, four tea spoons and four dessert spoons. The perfect addition to your cutlery collection.
DURABILITY | Made from fine quality 18/0 stainless steel, our cutlery is polished to a mirror finish. The long-lasting set is rust-resistant and can be used in the dishwasher.

EVERYDAY PURITY | The Everyday Purity collection is stylish and classic with its simple flared handle. 4 packs are available of each cutlery piece, including dinner knives, dinner forks, dessert spoons, and tea spoons if you would like to add to your set.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cookware made from the best materials.
